title: Ubiquiti UniFi Device Bridge - wireless bridge with PoE Out, 5GHz
description: This plug-and-play 5 GHz wireless bridge enables point-to-point connection to another Bridge device. It features one GbE RJ-45 PoE-Out port to power another device, such as cameras and other devices. The bridge itself is powered through a standard network cable (1) GbE PoE-Out port providing up to 15W power 5 GHz band with a data transfer rate of up to 867 Mbps Compatible with UniFi Protect PoE cameras, UniFi Talk phones, and other IoT devices Device Mounting materials External antenna Power cable
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 5 GHz WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11n, 802.11a Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 21 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Detachable Internal antennas 1 Detachable antennas 1 Antenna gain [dBi] 4, 5 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power PoE type PoE-Out (only) Max. power consumption [W] 25 Physical characteristics Purpose Outdoor Material Polycarbonate Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 40 Weight [g] 200 Width [mm] 55 Height [mm] 130 Depth [mm] 34
